SELECT split_part(query, '---', 2) AS query_name,
date_diff('millisecond', started, "end") AS runtime_ms,

FROM system.runtime.queries

SELECT split_part(query, '---', 2) AS query_name,
date_diff('millisecond', started, "end") AS runtime_ms,

FROM system.runtime.queries

SELECT split_part(query, '---', 2) AS query_name,
date_diff('millisecond', started, "end") AS runtime_ms,
analysis_time_ms, state
FROM system.runtime.queries
ORDER BY "end" DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT split_part(query, '---', 2) AS query_name,
date_diff('millisecond', started, "end") AS runtime_ms,
analysis_time_ms, state
FROM system.runtime.queries
ORDER BY "end" DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT split_part(query, '---', 2) AS query_name,
date_diff('millisecond', started, "end") AS runtime_ms,
analysis_time_ms, state
FROM system.runtime.queries
ORDER BY "end" DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT split_part(query, '---', 2) AS query_name,
date_diff('millisecond', started, "end") AS runtime_ms,

FROM system.runtime.queries

SELECT split_part(query, '---', 2) AS query_name,
date_diff('millisecond', started, "end") AS runtime_ms,
analysis_time_ms, state
FROM system.runtime.queries
ORDER BY "end" DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT split_part(query, '---', 2) AS query_name,
date_diff('millisecond', started, "end") AS runtime_ms,

FROM system.runtime.queries
ORDER BY "end" DESC LIMIT 1;
